label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's visualize this step by step. 1. Start facing forward. 2. Take 5 steps forward. So, I move 5 units in the forward direction. 3. Take 8 steps backward. Since I'm facing forward, backward is opposite. So, I go back 8 units, which is a net movement of -3 units from the start (5-8 = -3). 4. Take 4 steps forward. From the -3 position, moving forward 4 units brings me to +1 unit from the start. 5. Take 4 steps right. Since I'm still facing forward (original direction), moving right is perpendicular to my
